hypotheses.diagnosis: The generalized policy prioritizes safety branches while the smoke rewards direct best-reward proposal selection.
hypotheses.support: best_reward_select is the best baseline on both F13 and F14

hypotheses.diagnosis: Synthetic branch rules do not transfer cleanly to the CEC2013 F13/F14 proposal state.
hypotheses.support: F13 collapses to simple_safety and F14 mostly to zero_anchor

hypotheses.diagnosis: The proposal generator may be producing CEC2013 states where reward is more reliable than the synthetic panels assumed.
hypotheses.support: Best-reward proposals dominate in the smoke but were not the Stage 8.11 target behavior

hypotheses.diagnosis: The smoke may underrepresent multi-shared-variable interaction benefits, so it blocks 25 runs but does not falsify the whole idea.
hypotheses.support: Stage 8.14 exercises one shared-variable update path
